subject: Screen share freezes for attendees
description: Host shares PowerPoint; attendees see frozen slide while host sees live updates.

ts_steps.title: Share content type
ts_steps.action: Use 'Share Screen' → specific window vs full screen; try Optimize for video clip off for static slides.

ts_steps.title: Network
ts_steps.action: Host on wired if possible; lower resolution; disable 'Use TCP connection for screen sharing' test in advanced.

ts_steps.title: Update and graphics
ts_steps.action: Update Zoom and GPU drivers; disable second monitor temporarily as test.

internal_information: UDP loss, GPU overload, or dual-monitor DPI scaling bugs. Zoom support articles on sharing modes.
